reviews.author: Kelly Scott
reviews.text: This place is great for the whole family. Grab some food, grab some bubble tea, and play some games while you're there. The staff and the service was great. Ton of games to choose from. The food was okay, but the bubble teas were great.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini sangat cocok untuk seluruh keluarga. Anda bisa memesan makanan, minuman bubble tea, dan bermain beberapa permainan di sana. Staf dan pelayanannya luar biasa. Banyak pilihan permainan. Makanannya lumayan, tapi bubble tea-nya enak sekali.

reviews.author: Vinya Cherian
reviews.text: Love this place! The food here is actually really good, Id actually just go for the food even! The games are great and there are a lot of options ages 8+
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini! Makanan di sini benar-benar enak, saya bahkan akan datang ke sini hanya untuk makanannya! Permainannya bagus dan ada banyak pilihan untuk usia 8 tahun ke atas.

reviews.author: Travis Kruger
reviews.text: Fantastic place! Great board game selection. Lots of space. Great food
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang fantastis! Pilihan permainan papan yang bagus. Ruangannya luas. Makanannya enak.

reviews.author: Reesa Karamanski
reviews.text: Such an AMAZING yogurt boba drink, would absolutely recommend. Atmosphere was downright delightful, what an awesome place!!!🗣️
reviews.textTranslated: Minuman boba yogurtnya SANGAT ENAK, benar-benar saya rekomendasikan. Suasananya sangat menyenangkan, tempat yang luar biasa!!!🗣️

reviews.author: DJM Kanke-Goss
reviews.text: I got there when it opened and was the first one to order 4 people got their drinks first and it took 40 Minutes and I only ordered 2 drinks
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sampai di sana saat baru buka dan menjadi orang pertama yang memesan. 4 orang lainnya mendapat minuman mereka lebih dulu dan butuh waktu 40 menit, padahal saya hanya memesan 2 minuman.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi DJM Kanke-Goss, we apologize for your less than positive experience this morning. We understand that your time is valuable. Due to stock delay in the morning, our tapioca honey and brown sugar bubbles took longer to be ready, in addition to the already long cook time. The cashier should have informed you about the exact wait time for bubbles and be more active in communicating. All drinks that were served earlier had no tapioca bubbles. We will fix this on our backend to ensure proper communication and for this to not happen again. Please reach out to hello@rollplay.social so that we can make this right!

reviews.author: Lynn
reviews.text:
I ordered one boba drink there- I stood and waited for more than 20 minutes, even though there weren’t that many people. The front counter employee was constantly on his phone not giving updates for the excessive waiting time, there was no warning at for the wait time and it ruined the whole experience as I was in a time crunch.
If you go here I would suggest you go for hours and plan on waiting.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan satu minuman boba di sana - saya berdiri dan menunggu lebih dari 20 menit, meskipun tidak banyak orang. Karyawan di konter depan terus-menerus menggunakan ponselnya tanpa memberikan informasi terbaru tentang waktu tunggu yang terlalu lama, tidak ada peringatan sebelumnya tentang waktu tunggu dan itu merusak seluruh pengalaman karena saya sedang terburu-buru.
Jika Anda pergi ke sini, saya sarankan Anda menunggu berjam-jam dan bersiap untuk menunggu.

reviews.author: Dillon Schultz
reviews.text: This place is great and has become a staple for me and my wife.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini hebat dan telah menjadi tempat favorit saya dan istri.

reviews.author: Nikki Crabtree
reviews.text: This place is doing it right! Fabulous selection of Korean food at a good price and tasted phenomenal. Seasonal drink options, limited alcoholic options (which is more than I expected anyways). Service was great, owner was kind and respectful. Great selection of games to test out for all ages. Table cover charge if you didn't order $20 worth of food was very reasonable. Will definitely be coming by again!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar berhasil! Pilihan makanan Korea yang luar biasa dengan harga terjangkau dan rasanya fenomenal. Pilihan minuman musiman, pilihan minuman beralkohol terbatas (yang ternyata lebih banyak dari yang saya harapkan). Pelayanannya luar biasa, pemiliknya ramah dan sopan. Banyak pilihan permainan untuk dicoba semua umur. Biaya masuk meja jika Anda tidak memesan makanan senilai $20 sangat terjangkau. Pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Saicha Shaw
reviews.text: The food here I got food poisoning from and haven’t been back for food. The service was OK. The guy was pretty rude, but the atmosphere was so cool. I like the fact that you can play games and feel like a kid again.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan di sini membuat saya keracunan makanan dan belum pernah kembali lagi. Pelayanannya lumayan. Petugasnya agak kasar, tapi suasananya sangat nyaman. Saya suka karena di sini kita bisa main game dan merasa seperti anak kecil lagi.

reviews.author: Sherry K
reviews.text:
Fun atmosphere, good selection of food and games.  The building the cafe is houses in is gorgeous.  There is something for everyone in the family.  We tried the bibimbap w tofu, chicken kara-age, salmon poke, braised belly pork and rice and several boba drinks.  All generous servings and fresh tasting.  Huge selection of games too.  Nice high ceilings and spacious tables, conducive to playing games.  If we lived closer we would be regular visitors!
Next door there is pizza and an awesome coffee roaster!
reviews.textTranslated:
Suasananya menyenangkan, banyak pilihan makanan dan permainan. Bangunan kafe ini sangat indah. Ada sesuatu untuk semua orang di keluarga. Kami mencoba bibimbap dengan tahu, ayam karaage, salmon poke, perut babi rebus dengan nasi, dan beberapa minuman boba. Semua porsinya besar dan rasanya segar. Pilihan permainannya juga banyak. Langit-langitnya tinggi dan meja-mejanya luas, cocok untuk bermain game. Jika kami tinggal lebih dekat, kami pasti akan menjadi pengunjung tetap!
Di sebelahnya ada pizza dan pemanggang kopi yang luar biasa!

reviews.author: Pin-Jie Cheng
reviews.text: Never been to a place where board games and food are blended. It’s so cool and definitely will invite my friends come over. Lovely environment
reviews.textTranslated: Saya belum pernah ke tempat yang menggabungkan permainan papan dan makanan. Ini sangat keren dan saya pasti akan mengajak teman-teman saya datang. Suasananya menyenangkan.

reviews.author: jowyn lee
reviews.text:
Had such a great time at Roleplay Madison! I tried their bibimbap (hands down the best I’ve had in Madison!) along with other Asian dishes, and everything was absolutely delicious.
I also loved spending the evening playing board games with friends in a cozy, welcoming environment. The staff were super friendly and made the experience even better. A perfect spot to eat, play, and catch up with friends — highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated:
Senang sekali berada di Roleplay Madison! Saya mencoba bibimbap mereka (yang terbaik yang pernah saya coba di Madison!) bersama dengan hidangan Asia lainnya, dan semuanya benar-benar lezat.
Saya juga senang menghabiskan malam bermain permainan papan bersama teman-teman di lingkungan yang nyaman dan ramah. Stafnya sangat ramah dan membuat pengalaman itu semakin berkesan. Tempat yang sempurna untuk makan, bermain, dan bersosialisasi dengan teman-teman — sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Kyoko Felland
reviews.text: So fun!  Indoor and outdoor seating, great Boba drinks and of course, great games.
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat menyenangkan! Tersedia tempat duduk di dalam dan luar ruangan, minuman Boba yang enak, dan tentu saja, permainan yang seru.

reviews.author: urp
reviews.text: this place is vry fun. me and my friends come here extremely often, and just spend time laughing and drinking boba.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini sangat menyenangkan. Saya dan teman-teman saya sering sekali datang ke sini, dan hanya menghabiskan waktu tertawa dan minum boba.

reviews.author: Nishant Pillai
reviews.text: Outside of the disappointingly aggressively average Hinge date I went on here, this spot was awesome. Great food, great service, and a really solid board game selection. Definitely coming back with friends 😁
reviews.textTranslated: Selain kencan Hinge yang mengecewakan dan biasa-biasa saja yang saya jalani di sini, tempat ini luar biasa. Makanan enak, pelayanan bagus, dan pilihan permainan papan yang sangat bagus. Pasti akan kembali lagi bersama teman-teman 😁

reviews.author: Teresa
reviews.text: Such a cool old building with exposed brick and a history! I didn't get food but my Chai tea was lovely!
reviews.textTranslated: Bangunan tua yang keren sekali dengan dinding bata ekspos dan sejarah yang kaya! Saya tidak memesan makanan, tetapi teh Chai saya sangat enak!

reviews.author: Alma Cerretta
reviews.text: I met up with a few people from the conference I’m attending to get to know each other and check out Roll Play. We had a blast! They’ve got a cute library of games, some great food, and bubble tea - I tried the Catan Sunrise! The person who helped me was super welcoming. As a fellow board game café owner, I’d definitely visit again if I’m back in the area.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya bertemu dengan beberapa orang dari konferensi yang saya hadiri untuk saling mengenal dan mengunjungi Roll Play. Kami bersenang-senang! Mereka memiliki koleksi permainan yang menarik, makanan yang enak, dan bubble tea - saya mencoba Catan Sunrise! Orang yang membantu saya sangat ramah. Sebagai sesama pemilik kafe permainan papan, saya pasti akan berkunjung lagi jika saya kembali ke daerah tersebut.

reviews.author: Cosmic
reviews.text: I got this DoorDashed. I never had Taiyaki so I was excited. The Nutella Taiyaiki was very good. The Salmon in the poke was great too.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya dapat DoorDashed ini. Saya belum pernah makan Taiyaki, jadi saya senang sekali. Taiyaki Nutella-nya enak sekali. Salmon di poke-nya juga enak.

reviews.author: Daniel Bozarth
reviews.text: Ordering QR codes were broken. The tteokboki was phenomenal. Crab Rangon takoyaki was a choice. Teas were tea. Fee for games.
reviews.textTranslated: Kode QR untuk pemesanan rusak. Tteokboki-nya luar biasa. Takoyaki Crab Rangon juga enak. Tehnya biasa saja. Ada biaya untuk permainan.

reviews.author: michelle hackett
reviews.text: Love ❤️ this place. The food is good the games rock.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget ❤️ tempat ini. Makanannya enak, permainannya asyik.

reviews.author: Truong Vo
reviews.text: Fun place to go to for board games!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang menyenangkan untuk bermain permainan papan!

reviews.author: Sarah Trevino
reviews.text:
I can’t begin to express how phenomenal this restaurant is. They have, hands-down, some of the best food in Madison. The Singaporean Chicken rice is our constant favorite - get dark meat, a soy egg, and extra spicy sauce and you will not be disappointed.

I’ve loved this spot since it was over on State Street and it is even cuter now in the Garver Feed Mill.

Do yourself a favor and go play games and feast on great food with friends at Roll Play!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya tidak bisa mengungkapkan betapa fenomenalnya restoran ini. Mereka memiliki, tanpa diragukan, beberapa makanan terbaik di Madison. Nasi Ayam Singapura adalah favorit kami sepanjang masa - pesan daging gelap, telur kecap, dan saus ekstra pedas, dan Anda tidak akan kecewa.

Saya menyukai tempat ini sejak masih berada di State Street dan sekarang bahkan lebih menggemaskan di Garver Feed Mill.

Manjakan diri Anda dan mainkan game serta nikmati makanan enak bersama teman-teman di Roll Play!

reviews.author: Sophie Tran Saxton
reviews.text: It’s fine but very slow. It should not take 21 minutes to make bubble tea. I was told it was a 10 min wait to make the boba (fine, but weird given they’d already been open for half an hour) but it also took 20 minutes to make the strawberry slushie without boba. It wasn’t particularly busy, I was the first person there though they did serve others who came after me. Not worth the wait.
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak apa-apa tapi sangat lambat. Tidak perlu waktu 21 menit untuk membuat bubble tea. Saya diberitahu bahwa butuh 10 menit menunggu untuk membuat boba (baiklah, tapi aneh mengingat mereka sudah buka selama setengah jam) tetapi juga butuh 20 menit untuk membuat slushie stroberi tanpa boba. Itu tidak terlalu sibuk, saya adalah orang pertama di sana meskipun mereka melayani orang lain yang datang setelah saya. Tidak layak untuk ditunggu.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Sophie, thank you for your feedback. We  apologize for your negative experience. We understand your time is valuable and this has inconvenienced you. We would like to provide an explanation of what transpired. We do need some time in the morning to marinade the boba so that it’s tasty. Unfortunately, due to commencement week and bus delays, the staff in charge was 10-15 minutes late, thus causing a delay for the boba. We tried to serve the strawberry slushie as close to the other drinks with boba, so that everyone in the party can have their drinks as close to each other. Other drinks that were served beforehand were single orders without boba. Nevertheless, it is on us that your experience was less than ideal. Our team is focusing on increasing our efficiency and reducing wait times. Again, thank you for giving us the opportunity to to improve.

reviews.author: Ian Lefkowitz
reviews.text: Great concept, great hand rolls, solid selection of games, and great execution. Recommended!
reviews.textTranslated: Konsep yang bagus, lemparan dadu yang hebat, pilihan permainan yang solid, dan eksekusi yang luar biasa. Sangat direkomendasikan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Ian, thank you for the positive feedback. We hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: XxI see youxX
reviews.text: Cute place, good foods, good vibe.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang lucu, makanan enak, suasana menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Elle Vue
reviews.text: We went on a crowded day with kids. It was hectic to say the least. My children enjoy Korean/Asian food so they loved it. Played connect 4 and they couldn’t tell their bellies were hungry. Overall it’s clean and well maintained. Customer service seemed to be rushed and food came slowly.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami pergi pada hari yang ramai bersama anak-anak. Suasananya sangat kacau. Anak-anak saya menyukai makanan Korea/Asia jadi mereka sangat menyukainya. Kami bermain Connect 4 dan mereka tidak menyadari perut mereka lapar. Secara keseluruhan, tempatnya bersih dan terawat dengan baik. Pelayanan pelanggan tampak terburu-buru dan makanan datang dengan lambat.

reviews.author: Megan Syverson
reviews.text:
Delighted to have a game cafe on the Eastside. Great location, big board game selection, and a fun menu.

The only problem: it is loud and echoey. The metal chair legs scrape the concrete floors and the intermittent noise is grating. Destroyed the otherwise chill vibe for 2/3 of our group.

Would be 5 stars if they were to add some rubber feet to the chairs!
reviews.textTranslated:
Senang sekali ada kafe permainan di Eastside. Lokasi bagus, banyak pilihan permainan papan, dan menu yang menyenangkan.

Satu-satunya masalah: berisik dan bergema. Kaki kursi logam bergesekan dengan lantai beton dan suara yang sesekali terdengar sangat mengganggu. Merusak suasana santai bagi 2/3 kelompok kami.

Akan mendapat 5 bintang jika mereka menambahkan alas karet pada kursi!

reviews.author: David.Andrew Bernhardt
reviews.text: The food is surprisingly amazing. The space is a bit cramped and the tables feel a touch too small to accommodate larger board games and food. And the ordering process is really clunky.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sungguh luar biasa. Tempatnya agak sempit dan mejanya terasa terlalu kecil untuk menampung permainan papan yang besar dan makanan. Dan proses pemesanannya sangat merepotkan.

reviews.author: Korey Peterson
reviews.text: Very cool place, boba tea was tasty. I'll have to come back and play some games sometime
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya keren banget, boba tea-nya enak. Aku harus kembali lagi dan main game di sana lain waktu.

reviews.author: Elizabeth
reviews.text: My friends and I have been to RollPlay many times in the past, it is a favorite spot for us to hang out. The food is always delicious and the board game selection is large; however, tonight I experienced one of the kindest gestures from a restaurant ever. I usually order their Singaporean Chicken (very good btw) but I decided to switch it up and go for the Taiwanese pork bowl. Unfortunately it wasn’t for me, and it was 100% a personal taste thing. I don’t like fennel or anise and I can’t stomach it. The dish contained one of the two or something similar. I didn’t want to cause any trouble because again this is fully on me and I am a firm believer that it is not the restaurant’s responsibility if I don’t like the taste of something I picked. After seeing if anyone wanted to take it home or eat it, I decided to just place it in the bus bin. The Server/ Host that was on duty + the manager noticed my food in the bus bin. He came up to our table to make sure everything was alright. I told him it wasn’t for me  but that it was okay and he immediately asked me if they could get me the Singaporean chicken instead. It’s also about 10 minutes to close and he was very kindly insisting, I was so so appreciative. They offered me the whole Singaporean meal last minute and was extremely nice. I cannot thank them enough and I was beyond touched. I wish I handed it to him directly but we left extra cash in the tip jar as a thank you. This was 09/15/24 so if the employee who very kindly helped us we thank you greatly and you made our night!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya dan teman-teman saya sudah sering ke RollPlay di masa lalu, tempat ini adalah tempat favorit kami untuk nongkrong. Makanannya selalu enak dan pilihan permainan papannya banyak; namun, malam ini saya mengalami salah satu kebaikan hati paling luar biasa dari sebuah restoran. Biasanya saya memesan Ayam Singapura mereka (sangat enak lho) tetapi saya memutuskan untuk mencoba sesuatu yang berbeda dan memesan mangkuk babi Taiwan. Sayangnya, rasanya tidak cocok untuk saya, dan itu 100% masalah selera pribadi. Saya tidak suka adas atau adas manis dan saya tidak tahan dengan rasanya. Hidangan itu mengandung salah satu dari keduanya atau sesuatu yang mirip. Saya tidak ingin menimbulkan masalah karena sekali lagi ini sepenuhnya tanggung jawab saya dan saya sangat percaya bahwa bukan tanggung jawab restoran jika saya tidak menyukai rasa sesuatu yang saya pilih. Setelah melihat apakah ada yang ingin membawanya pulang atau memakannya, saya memutuskan untuk meletakkannya di tempat sampah. Pelayan/Hostel yang bertugas + manajer memperhatikan makanan saya di tempat sampah. Dia datang ke meja kami untuk memastikan semuanya baik-baik saja. Saya bilang padanya itu bukan untuk saya tapi tidak apa-apa dan dia langsung bertanya apakah mereka bisa memberi saya ayam Singapura sebagai gantinya. Waktunya juga sekitar 10 menit sebelum tutup dan dia dengan ramah bersikeras, saya sangat menghargainya. Mereka menawarkan saya seluruh hidangan Singapura di menit-menit terakhir dan itu sangat baik. Saya tidak bisa cukup berterima kasih kepada mereka dan saya sangat tersentuh. Saya berharap saya memberikannya langsung kepadanya tetapi kami meninggalkan uang tambahan di kotak tip sebagai ucapan terima kasih. Ini terjadi pada 15/09/2024 jadi jika karyawan yang dengan ramah membantu kami, kami sangat berterima kasih dan Anda telah membuat malam kami menyenangkan!

reviews.author: Nathan R
reviews.text: Was told food would take 20 mins, it took 35. Portion was small and not worth the +$8. Atmosphere was loud, with no acoustic dampening the brick walls really make volume loud for playing games. Noticed some food code violations with the server, doesn't seem like any manager is present. Probably wouldn't come back, especially not for food/beverage.
reviews.textTranslated: Awalnya diberitahu makanan akan siap dalam 20 menit, ternyata butuh 35 menit. Porsinya kecil dan tidak sepadan dengan harga tambahan $8. Suasananya berisik, tanpa peredam suara, dinding bata membuat suara sangat keras untuk bermain game. Saya melihat beberapa pelanggaran kode makanan oleh pelayan, sepertinya tidak ada manajer yang hadir. Mungkin saya tidak akan kembali lagi, terutama untuk makanan/minuman.

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text: The bubble tea is great!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Teh bobanya enak banget!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

reviews.author: 道林老师
reviews.text: Second time I have gone and told they ran out of rice! Kinda big deal as several dishes sort of need rice, like come on. Be prepared to wait a long long time and then eat mediocre food. Nice spot for board games, but come on a full stomach here and order a boba…you might have to wait 30 minutes for it though.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini kedua kalinya saya datang dan diberitahu bahwa mereka kehabisan nasi! Agak masalah besar karena beberapa hidangan memang membutuhkan nasi, ayolah. Bersiaplah untuk menunggu sangat lama dan kemudian makan makanan yang biasa-biasa saja. Tempat yang bagus untuk bermain permainan papan, tetapi datanglah dengan perut kenyang dan pesan boba… Anda mungkin harus menunggu 30 menit untuk mendapatkannya.

reviews.author: 라니챠니
reviews.text: Having a nice day with my bubble tea! It is so good!
reviews.textTranslated: Selamat menikmati harimu dengan bubble tea-ku! Enak banget!

reviews.author: Joseph Kay
reviews.text: Really like this little board game shop.  Only gripe is the sushi.  They make a "hand roll" style that while it's cheap is difficult to eat due to the tough seaweed "paper" they use.  Asked if they could just "classic" roll and cut them.  Was informed they could not cut them at all.  Which begs the question, do they have knives?  How do they perform proper cuts on the fish?  Odd as they serve negi Toro and otoro, which are rather rich cuts of tuna and need proper cutlery for the proper cuts used in sushi.  Was a bummer as I live within walking distance and would have regularly eaten $30+ worth of sushi regularly would they have been able to honor this simple request.  Bummer.  But please come in and enjoy the games and atmosphere along with all of the other delicious menu items!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat suka toko permainan papan kecil ini. Satu-satunya yang kurang memuaskan adalah sushinya. Mereka membuat sushi "hand roll" yang meskipun murah, sulit dimakan karena "kertas" rumput laut yang keras. Saya bertanya apakah mereka bisa menggulung dan memotongnya dengan "cara klasik". Diberitahu bahwa mereka tidak bisa memotongnya sama sekali. Yang jadi pertanyaan, apakah mereka punya pisau? Bagaimana cara mereka memotong ikan dengan benar? Aneh karena mereka menyajikan negi Toro dan otoro, potongan tuna yang cukup tebal dan membutuhkan alat makan yang tepat untuk potongan yang tepat yang digunakan dalam sushi. Agak mengecewakan karena saya tinggal cukup dekat dan biasanya sudah makan sushi seharga $30+, apakah mereka bisa mengabulkan permintaan sederhana ini? Sayang sekali. Tapi silakan datang dan nikmati permainan dan suasananya serta semua menu lezat lainnya!

reviews.author: Michelle Adams
reviews.text: Great place for older teens to hang out and have fun, while eating something affordable and tasty.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk para remaja untuk nongkrong dan bersenang-senang, sambil menyantap sesuatu yang terjangkau dan lezat.

reviews.author: Peter J
reviews.text: Great setup, kind of poor communication
reviews.textTranslated: Fasilitasnya bagus, tapi komunikasinya agak kurang baik.

reviews.author: Loan Chung
reviews.text: Fun place for a meal. They have a very expensive collection of board games and expansion packs. Great for just 2 people or a large group.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang menyenangkan untuk makan. Mereka memiliki koleksi permainan papan dan paket ekspansi yang sangat mahal. Cocok untuk berdua atau kelompok besar.

reviews.author: Pass P
reviews.text: Taiwanese pork was really good, chicken was really soft in the chicken rice.
reviews.textTranslated: Daging babi Taiwannya enak banget, ayamnya empuk banget di nasi ayamnya.

reviews.author: Julia Fraser
reviews.text: Good food, ample seating, many board games. I like that if you spend money on food and drinks, which I'm probably going to anyway, then there's no board game fee. The menu has a lot of options and the service is quick. I am interested in going to their events, but I wish the location was closer to downtown. I guess the parking is one benefit of the farther location though.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak, tempat duduk luas, banyak permainan papan. Saya suka karena jika Anda memesan makanan dan minuman, yang mungkin akan saya lakukan, maka tidak ada biaya tambahan untuk permainan papan. Menunya memiliki banyak pilihan dan pelayanannya cepat. Saya tertarik untuk menghadiri acara mereka, tetapi saya berharap lokasinya lebih dekat ke pusat kota. Mungkin parkir adalah salah satu keuntungan dari lokasi yang lebih jauh.

reviews.author: Helen Patterson
reviews.text: Visiting from out of town and found this little gem.  Claudia took our order and she was so friendly and helpful when it came to answering questions about the different drinks.   Would recommend anyone go check the place out
reviews.textTranslated: Kami datang dari luar kota dan menemukan tempat yang menakjubkan ini. Claudia menerima pesanan kami dan dia sangat ramah serta membantu dalam menjawab pertanyaan tentang berbagai minuman. Saya merekomendasikan siapa pun untuk mengunjungi tempat ini.

reviews.author: S Nandi
reviews.text: The jewel of Garver, Roll Play is the most entertaining hangout spot. From the amazing Korean food, boba, and beer to the large board game selection to the helpful and kind staff, this place is a must-visit next time you are visiting the east side.
reviews.textTranslated: Roll Play, permata Garver, adalah tempat nongkrong paling menghibur. Mulai dari makanan Korea yang luar biasa, boba, dan bir hingga pilihan permainan papan yang beragam dan staf yang ramah dan membantu, tempat ini wajib dikunjungi saat Anda berkunjung ke sisi timur kota.

reviews.author: Johanna Cherry
reviews.text: Just finished our first visit to Roll Play and it was fantastic! The food was delicious and very fresh and the staff were so friendly and very helpful! Will definitely be back and recommend it to others!
reviews.textTranslated: Baru saja selesai kunjungan pertama kami ke Roll Play dan itu fantastis! Makanannya enak dan sangat segar, dan stafnya sangat ramah dan sangat membantu! Pasti akan kembali lagi dan merekomendasikannya kepada orang lain!

reviews.author: HARRY TAN
reviews.text: The food was authentic and great especially the Singapore Chicken rice as both my wife and I have travelled to Singapore, Korea and Taiwan...
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya otentik dan enak sekali, terutama nasi ayam Singapura karena saya dan istri saya pernah berkunjung ke Singapura, Korea, dan Taiwan...

reviews.author: Sam Miskowski
reviews.text: Great board game selection, and the most amazing Singaporean Chicken Rice. I go there regularly, and constantly recommend it to all my friends!
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan permainan papan yang bagus, dan Nasi Ayam Singapura yang paling enak. Saya sering ke sana, dan selalu merekomendasikannya kepada semua teman saya!

reviews.author: Robin Sereno
reviews.text: Was crazy overpriced. Took a long time and tasted blah.
reviews.textTranslated: Harganya sangat mahal. Pelayanannya lama dan rasanya hambar.

reviews.author: Travis blumenstein
reviews.text: I love this place. There are tons of board games, their boba is really good. They also have a small menu of Korean inspired dishes and apps. I am a big fan of the red bean tayaki.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini. Ada banyak permainan papan, boba mereka benar-benar enak. Mereka juga punya menu kecil berisi hidangan dan aplikasi bertema Korea. Saya penggemar berat tayaki kacang merah.

reviews.author: Daniel B
reviews.text: Fantastic. Great food, great board game collection, very affordable.
reviews.textTranslated: Fantastis. Makanannya enak, koleksi permainan papannya lengkap, harganya juga terjangkau.

reviews.author: Ivy Sturkol
reviews.text: This place is excellent! Love that they have taiyaki and boba tea. The service was excellent as well.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini luar biasa! Saya suka karena mereka punya taiyaki dan boba tea. Pelayanannya juga sangat baik.

reviews.author: Rachel Hamel
reviews.text:
Love the concept and all the games. I came in with my 3 kids 6 and under and we were able to have a nice snack and find several games that even my 1 year could participate in. There are also lots of high level strategy games so definitely something for everyone. I hope to come back with my kids when they get older and have a bit more of an attention span.

My only issue was that the boba was not consistently chewy— some of it was undercooked and some was too soft. Also the tea flavor was very weak it was almost just milk. Its so hard to find a truly excellent bubble tea— I think this cafe will stand out if they can pull it off.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya suka konsep dan semua permainannya. Saya datang bersama 3 anak saya yang berusia 6 tahun ke bawah, dan kami bisa menikmati camilan enak serta menemukan beberapa permainan yang bahkan bisa diikuti oleh anak saya yang berusia 1 tahun. Ada juga banyak permainan strategi tingkat tinggi, jadi pasti ada sesuatu untuk semua orang. Saya berharap bisa kembali lagi bersama anak-anak saya ketika mereka sudah lebih besar dan memiliki rentang perhatian yang lebih baik.

Satu-satunya masalah saya adalah boba-nya kurang kenyal—ada yang kurang matang dan ada yang terlalu lembek. Rasa tehnya juga sangat lemah, hampir seperti susu. Sangat sulit menemukan bubble tea yang benar-benar enak—saya rasa kafe ini akan menonjol jika mereka berhasil.

reviews.author: Paul Oliphant
reviews.text: Great place to spend an evening.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk menghabiskan malam.

reviews.author: Luisa Oropeza
reviews.text: This little shopping center in the middle of nowhere , roll play is inside. They have a large selection of games, a small menu but the food is delicious, bubble tea is a plus. The employees are friendly and ready to help you with any questions regarding the games.
reviews.textTranslated: Pusat perbelanjaan kecil ini terletak di tempat terpencil, dan di dalamnya terdapat area bermain peran. Mereka memiliki banyak pilihan permainan, menu yang sederhana namun makanannya lezat, dan bubble tea-nya juga enak. Para karyawan ramah dan siap membantu Anda dengan pertanyaan apa pun terkait permainan.

reviews.author: Amy P
reviews.text: I've only done take out items from Roll Play but it is super cute and has a great vibe! Very chill nerdy vibe, like cool nerd ambience.  Staff were very friendly and acknowledged my presence right away even though he was busy with another customer.  It's very clean and organized and they have loads of games.  The boba is served with those sealed tops so you can worry less about spilling.  I got my kids take out food that the said was good (I didn't try it). Clearly under Korean ownership based on the menu!  I did order from their website and was initially given a pick up time that was an hour+, but was contacted by Roll Play to say my order can be ready in 15 minutes.  They prefer online orders, but I suggest calling about pick up time.  You can drive to the back of Garver where there at steps that lead directly into Roll Play for faster pick up.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya hanya mencoba makanan untuk dibawa pulang dari Roll Play, tetapi tempat ini sangat lucu dan memiliki suasana yang hebat! Suasana kutu buku yang sangat santai, seperti suasana kutu buku yang keren. Staf sangat ramah dan segera menyadari kehadiran saya meskipun dia sedang sibuk dengan pelanggan lain. Tempat ini sangat bersih dan teratur dan mereka memiliki banyak permainan. Boba disajikan dengan tutup yang disegel sehingga Anda tidak perlu khawatir tentang tumpahan. Saya membeli makanan untuk anak-anak saya yang katanya enak (saya tidak mencobanya). Jelas di bawah kepemilikan Korea berdasarkan menu! Saya memesan dari situs web mereka dan awalnya diberi waktu penjemputan satu jam+, tetapi dihubungi oleh Roll Play untuk mengatakan pesanan saya dapat siap dalam 15 menit. Mereka lebih suka pesanan online, tetapi saya sarankan untuk menelepon tentang waktu penjemputan. Anda dapat berkendara ke belakang Garver di mana ada tangga yang mengarah langsung ke Roll Play untuk penjemputan yang lebih cepat.

reviews.author: Beth Behr
reviews.text: Delicious food! Amazing tea with so many combinations, I'll never run out of new things to try! And an extensive game selection that is well organized and labeled so you can easily pick up something new. I'm sure the staff are helpful with game selection too, I just didn't have the chance to play when I visited. Next time!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak sekali! Tehnya luar biasa dengan begitu banyak kombinasi, saya tidak akan pernah kehabisan hal baru untuk dicoba! Dan pilihan permainannya sangat banyak, tertata rapi, dan diberi label sehingga Anda dapat dengan mudah memilih sesuatu yang baru. Saya yakin stafnya juga membantu dalam memilih permainan, saya hanya tidak sempat bermain saat berkunjung. Lain kali!

reviews.author: Erika Weir Jackson
reviews.text: Went there yesterday with friends for my husband's birthday.  The food was great and reasonably priced. The woman who was working there was very nice and great at her job. I got to try the winter melon Boba lemonade and it was great! There was a good selection of games for a variety of group size. I am excited to go back and play the tournament games this summer!
reviews.textTranslated: Kemarin saya pergi ke sana bersama teman-teman untuk ulang tahun suami saya. Makanannya enak dan harganya terjangkau. Wanita yang bekerja di sana sangat ramah dan hebat dalam pekerjaannya. Saya mencoba limun boba melon musim dingin dan rasanya enak sekali! Ada banyak pilihan permainan untuk berbagai ukuran kelompok. Saya sangat bersemangat untuk kembali dan bermain di turnamen musim panas ini!

reviews.author: Tate Dremstedt
reviews.text: Cool place! Popular!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang keren! Populer!

reviews.author: K R
reviews.text: Really tasty. We tried their chicken bowl,  braised pork, kimbap, taiyaki and boba tea. Definitely coming back to try their bibimbap and Tteokbokki.  Also Had a fun time with their selection of board games
reviews.textTranslated: Enak banget. Kami coba chicken bowl, braised pork, kimbap, taiyaki, dan boba tea mereka. Pasti akan kembali lagi untuk coba bibimbap dan tteokbokki mereka. Kami juga senang-senang dengan pilihan permainan papan mereka.

reviews.author: Gena Casper-Gohr
reviews.text: Food and tea tasted great. Awesome selection of board games. We went on a Saturday evening and it was really busy, but the workers took the time to help us with the games when it wasn't as busy and had excellent customer service.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan tehnya enak sekali. Pilihan permainan papannya juga luar biasa. Kami pergi pada Sabtu malam dan tempatnya sangat ramai, tetapi para pekerjanya meluangkan waktu untuk membantu kami dengan permainan-permainan yang tersedia saat tidak terlalu ramai dan memberikan layanan pelanggan yang sangat baik.

reviews.author: Ben Minnis
reviews.text: Great food and endless games! Really kind staff too. Love this place.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak dan banyak permainan! Stafnya juga ramah. Suka banget sama tempat ini.

reviews.author: Madelyn Pattison
reviews.text: Trivia night group ojting qas so cool. As a picky eater, the food was amazing. I loved my little fish ( I don't remember the official name), but it was so good.
reviews.textTranslated: Kegiatan malam kuis bersama kelompok sangat menyenangkan. Sebagai orang yang pilih-pilih makanan, makanannya luar biasa. Saya suka ikan kecil saya (saya tidak ingat nama resminya), tapi rasanya sangat enak.

reviews.author: ahsg ahsg
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi ahsg ahsg, we apologize for your unpleasant experience at Roll Play. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. Feedback helps us improve. May I know which dish did you order? I will look into the matter with my team and figure out what went wrong. We want to remedy this situation because our customers’ satisfaction is our top priority. Would you be able to reach out at rollplaymadison@gmail.com?

reviews.author: Mimi
reviews.text:
I love this place. The staff, the food (Korean) and the games are amazing. Teokbokki was amazing!!! They would waive $5 fee if you spend more than $20 as a group, which was really nice.

There are a lot of games, they said more than 250 games. The location is perfect with other restaurants or a pizza place like Ian’s pizza. The restroom super clean right next to it.

One thing I would like to add is to have staff become the expert of the games and help explain how to play each game briefly or recommend games based on the styles of games players are looking for. I have been to different board game cafes in different cities. They always have something like that. The first time we were there, we spent most of the time reading instructions.
Now that I’m thinking about going back, I feel a bit discouraged because it feels like I can’t just spontaneously go there and have fun but I have to do some research of what games they have and what I want to play and learn how to play it first so I don’t waste time reading instructions again. And when it comes to games and fun, it shouldn’t take this much effort.

Just some suggestions you can consider. Your place has a lot of potential and I’m rooting for you!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya suka tempat ini. Stafnya, makanannya (Korea), dan permainannya luar biasa. Teokbokki-nya luar biasa!!! Mereka akan membebaskan biaya $5 jika Anda menghabiskan lebih dari $20 bersama rombongan, dan itu sangat menyenangkan.

Ada banyak permainan, katanya lebih dari 250 permainan. Lokasinya sempurna, dekat dengan restoran lain atau restoran pizza seperti Ian's Pizza. Toiletnya sangat bersih tepat di sebelahnya.

Satu hal yang ingin saya tambahkan adalah meminta staf menjadi ahli dalam permainan dan membantu menjelaskan cara bermain setiap permainan secara singkat atau merekomendasikan permainan berdasarkan gaya permainan yang dicari pemain. Saya telah mengunjungi berbagai kafe permainan papan di berbagai kota. Mereka selalu menyediakan sesuatu seperti itu. Pertama kali kami ke sana, kami menghabiskan sebagian besar waktu membaca instruksi. Sekarang setelah saya berpikir untuk kembali, saya merasa agak kecil hati karena rasanya saya tidak bisa begitu saja pergi ke sana dan bersenang-senang secara spontan, tetapi saya harus mencari tahu dulu permainan apa yang mereka miliki dan apa yang ingin saya mainkan, lalu belajar cara memainkannya agar saya tidak membuang waktu membaca instruksi lagi. Dan untuk permainan dan kesenangan, seharusnya tidak perlu usaha sebanyak ini.

Hanya beberapa saran yang bisa Anda pertimbangkan. Tempat Anda memiliki banyak potensi dan saya mendukung Anda!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mimipimpaporn, thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We are glad that you had a good experience with our staff, food and games! Our staff members do know how to play most of the games, so please do not hesitate to ask us to recommend new games or walkthrough game rules. We have also discussed internally on how we can improve our service and are starting to implement them. Thank you again for helping us improve and we look forward to serving you at Roll Play.

reviews.author: Jennie Leunig
reviews.text: This hidden gem has truly delicious food and lots of fun games! We tried the jian bing, which is an egg/crepe with sauce, crispy wantons, and scallions inside. I didn't know what to expect, but the amazing depth of flavor and the amount of food it was for less than $9 was such a pleasant surprise! I will absolutely be coming back to try their other food and discover new games. 10/10 great spot to spend a good chunk of the day, especially in the dreary season!
reviews.textTranslated: Permata tersembunyi ini punya makanan yang benar-benar lezat dan banyak permainan seru! Kami mencoba jian bing, yaitu telur/krep dengan saus, wonton renyah, dan daun bawang di dalamnya. Saya tidak tahu apa yang diharapkan, tetapi kedalaman rasa yang luar biasa dan jumlah makanannya yang kurang dari $9 sungguh kejutan yang menyenangkan! Saya pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba makanan mereka yang lain dan menemukan permainan baru. 10/10, tempat yang bagus untuk menghabiskan sebagian besar hari, terutama di musim yang suram!

reviews.author: Kathryn Cue
reviews.text: Delicious food and treats, everything is super fresh. Friendly staff. Taiyaki and mochi muffins, etc. are made to order, not from frozen! Since everything is so fresh, it can take a few minutes for the order to be ready.  Likely not an issue though if you are staying to play games. Very clean and cozy place, with great style and a pleasant atmosphere.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan camilannya lezat, semuanya sangat segar. Stafnya ramah. Taiyaki dan muffin mochi, dll., dibuat sesuai pesanan, bukan dari bahan beku! Karena semuanya sangat segar, mungkin perlu beberapa menit hingga pesanan siap. Namun, kemungkinan besar tidak akan menjadi masalah jika Anda berencana untuk bermain game. Tempatnya sangat bersih dan nyaman, dengan gaya yang bagus dan suasana yang menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Ian T
reviews.text: One of the most authentic Asian food in madison with a wide selection of food options that includes Korean, Taiwanese and Singaporean options. Flavours are spot on and drinks are creatively made. Chicken rice is a MUST TRY!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu restoran makanan Asia paling otentik di Madison dengan beragam pilihan makanan yang mencakup masakan Korea, Taiwan, dan Singapura. Cita rasanya sangat pas dan minumannya diracik secara kreatif. Nasi ayam WAJIB DICOBA!!!

reviews.author: David Koronet
reviews.text: The food is good (mostly with a Korean influence), but really the appeal of roll play is coming with a group of people and playing games. There is a charge for playing, but if you order a reasonable amount of food that fee is waived.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak (sebagian besar dengan pengaruh Korea), tetapi daya tarik utama dari permainan peran adalah datang bersama sekelompok orang dan bermain game. Ada biaya untuk bermain, tetapi jika Anda memesan makanan dalam jumlah yang wajar, biaya tersebut akan dibebaskan.

reviews.author: Jim Lieck
reviews.text: Had some very nice rice bowls and bubble tea 😊
reviews.textTranslated: Menikmati semangkuk nasi dan teh susu yang sangat enak 😊

reviews.author: Nick Murphy
reviews.text: Singapore Chicken Rice! Great addition to Garver.
reviews.textTranslated: Nasi Ayam Singapura! Tambahan yang pas untuk Garver.

reviews.author: Cheyenne Klitzke
reviews.text: Great selection of board games and I crave the Chicken Rice on a weekly basis
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan permainan papan yang bagus dan saya selalu ngidam Nasi Ayam setiap minggu.

reviews.author: Nikolas Heyworth
reviews.text: Fantastic food and games, lots of fun. They now have bubble tea! Always the same people working and they take their jobs seriously. Highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan permainannya fantastis, sangat menyenangkan. Sekarang mereka juga punya bubble tea! Selalu ada orang yang sama yang bekerja dan mereka menjalankan pekerjaan mereka dengan serius. Sangat direkomendasikan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Nikolas, thank you for your review. We are glad you enjoy our new pop up at Garver. Hope to see you soon!

reviews.author: Brooke Wedeward
reviews.text: Food is beyond excellent
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa enak.

reviews.author: Henry Lennington
reviews.text: Awesome board games and food! I'm going to miss this place when I move away
reviews.textTranslated: Permainan papan dan makanannya luar biasa! Aku akan merindukan tempat ini saat pindah nanti.

reviews.author: Corinna Zennig
reviews.text: I really enjoy their food selection here. The taste can be hit or miss but when it hits you want to order again. The Taiyaki, for instance, was pretty soggy. They have a great boardgame rental service. Of course the best way to enjoy this place is to game and eat!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat menikmati pilihan makanan mereka di sini. Rasanya kadang enak kadang tidak, tetapi ketika enak, Anda pasti ingin memesan lagi. Taiyaki-nya, misalnya, agak lembek. Mereka memiliki layanan penyewaan permainan papan yang bagus. Tentu saja, cara terbaik untuk menikmati tempat ini adalah dengan bermain game dan makan!

reviews.author: Allie Jenkins
reviews.text: Great food and had a lot of fun playing games with my friends. Definitely will be coming back when old friends are in town and want to go eat out.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak dan saya sangat senang bermain game bersama teman-teman. Pasti akan kembali lagi ketika teman-teman lama datang berkunjung dan ingin makan di luar.

reviews.author: Julia
reviews.text: Such an underrated hole in the wall place! The food here is honestly very good and it’s fun to come here with larger groups of friends.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat nongkrong yang kurang dikenal! Makanannya sungguh enak dan menyenangkan untuk datang bersama teman-teman yang lebih banyak.

reviews.author: Deb Thiel
reviews.text: I really hate a business that doesn't post when they are closed !
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat benci bisnis yang tidak mengumumkan saat mereka tutup!

reviews.author: Zoe Monster
reviews.text: I love this place and hope it sticks around
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menyukai tempat ini dan berharap tempat ini tetap ada.

reviews.author: Bianca Whitney
reviews.text:
Definitely worth checking out! Love this place. Great food, and a great variety. Food items I haven't found at other restaurants in Madison. Excellent selection of games, and the owner and staff are knowledgeable of games and available to answer any questions you have while playing.
Clean, welcoming, friendly environment. Great experience all around.
reviews.textTranslated:
Patut dicoba! Saya suka tempat ini. Makanannya enak, dan beragam. Menu yang belum pernah saya temukan di restoran lain di Madison. Pilihan permainannya sangat bagus, dan pemilik serta stafnya berpengetahuan tentang permainan dan siap menjawab pertanyaan apa pun yang Anda miliki saat bermain.
Bersih, ramah, dan bersahabat. Pengalaman yang luar biasa secara keseluruhan.

reviews.author: Jeff Kammerman
reviews.text:
Delicious food + an amazing game selection. Made for a great date night. The owner was super helpful with game recommendations and had plenty of suggestions for games we might try next time we come in. Service was a little bit slow at first (it got better throughout the evening), but that gave us plenty of time to pick a game and start reading the instructions.

We’ll definitely be back, both to try more off the menu and a new game from their collection!
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanan lezat + pilihan permainan yang luar biasa. Sempurna untuk kencan malam yang menyenangkan. Pemiliknya sangat membantu dengan rekomendasi permainan dan punya banyak saran permainan yang mungkin bisa kami coba saat berkunjung lagi. Pelayanannya agak lambat pada awalnya (dan membaik seiring berjalannya waktu), tetapi itu memberi kami banyak waktu untuk memilih permainan dan mulai membaca instruksinya.

Kami pasti akan kembali, baik untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu maupun permainan baru dari koleksi mereka!

reviews.author: Bailey Tran
reviews.text: Interesting experience and do able concept. We were there on a particularly busy day and the food took longer than expected to arrive. Luckily however we didn't really notice because we were enthralled with the game we chose. The food once it arrived was delicious. Next time I will go in when it's less busy.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman yang menarik dan konsep yang bisa diterapkan. Kami datang pada hari yang sangat ramai dan makanan membutuhkan waktu lebih lama dari yang diharapkan untuk sampai. Untungnya, kami tidak terlalu memperhatikannya karena kami asyik dengan permainan yang kami pilih. Setelah makanan sampai, rasanya sangat lezat. Lain kali saya akan datang saat tidak terlalu ramai.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Dear Bailey, thank you for taking the time to leave a valuable feedback. We apologize for the long wait time. Our shop is severely short staffed right now and we are taking the necessary steps to fix this issue. Again, thank you for your patience and we hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: Cody Lewis
reviews.text:
Great staff and with a fun, international menu.

They helped us learn how to play Azul, which was a blast, and we’ll be back to try out more board games and food in the future!
reviews.textTranslated:
Stafnya hebat dan menunya internasional dan menyenangkan.

Mereka membantu kami belajar bermain Azul, yang sangat seru, dan kami akan kembali untuk mencoba lebih banyak permainan papan dan makanan di masa mendatang!

reviews.author: Alexus Quinn
reviews.text: The food was fantastic! Will definetly be ordering the custard taiyaki again!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya fantastis! Pasti akan memesan custard taiyaki lagi!!

reviews.author: Anna J
reviews.text: So good! The food was awesome and the employees were very friendly. I can't wait to try more of their menu!
reviews.textTranslated: Enak banget! Makanannya luar biasa dan karyawannya ramah banget. Aku nggak sabar untuk coba menu mereka lagi!

reviews.author: Travis Schmitt
reviews.text: Great place, friendly service, and huge game selection!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus, pelayanan yang ramah, dan banyak pilihan permainan!

reviews.author: Sowie Jose
reviews.text: Amazing food and awesome environment! Had a great time playing games and eating!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang luar biasa dan suasana yang mengagumkan! Sangat menyenangkan bermain game dan makan!

reviews.author: Jason Struck
reviews.text: Had the spicy beef noodle soup, with spice set to a comfortable but sweaty 3/5. The flavor was on point, the portion size generous but not obscene, and the radish and carrot were buttery soft. My only gripe is that the beef needed a lot more cooking time. The meat was super tough and got stuck in my teeth, and after minutes of chewing the fat was still in one piece. Still, the soup was great. The sesame oil on the noodles was a nice touch.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan sup mie daging sapi pedas, dengan tingkat kepedasan 3/5 yang nyaman tapi membuat berkeringat. Rasanya pas, porsinya banyak tapi tidak berlebihan, dan lobak serta wortelnya sangat lembut. Satu-satunya keluhan saya adalah daging sapinya perlu dimasak lebih lama. Dagingnya sangat alot dan tersangkut di gigi, dan setelah beberapa menit dikunyah, lemaknya masih utuh. Namun, supnya tetap enak. Minyak wijen pada mie adalah sentuhan yang bagus.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jason, we would like to thank you for leaving a valuable feedback. Since your review, we have updated our cooking time for the beef brisket and they are more tender right now. We cannot tell you enough how appreciative we are for your suggestions. Please feel free to email rollplaymadison@gmail.com if you would like to provide additional feedback. Thank you very much and we hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: Shivani Konda
reviews.text: This place is awesome! The food is great, everything I've tried has been excellent so its absolutely worth the wait. The staff is amazing and their game master is so helpful! They have a huge selection of board games! Highly recommend
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini luar biasa! Makanannya enak, semua yang saya coba sangat lezat jadi benar-benar sepadan dengan waktu menunggunya. Stafnya luar biasa dan game master mereka sangat membantu! Mereka memiliki banyak pilihan permainan papan! Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: cj studios
reviews.text: The food was amazing! and there were so many games available! On top of that the service was fantastic and our server so nice and helpful. if you like board games I definitly recommned going inside and trying out this unique experience. But if you just want amazing streetfood they've got that covered too
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa! Dan ada banyak sekali permainan yang tersedia! Selain itu, pelayanannya fantastis dan pelayan kami sangat ramah dan membantu. Jika Anda suka permainan papan, saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk masuk dan mencoba pengalaman unik ini. Tetapi jika Anda hanya ingin makanan jalanan yang luar biasa, mereka juga menyediakannya.

reviews.author: Charles Thio (Ploot)
reviews.text: Best Asian street food in Madison, get the Chicken Rice and Chinese crepes! Huge board game selection as well, can’t wait for covid restrictions to end
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan jalanan Asia terbaik di Madison, cobalah Nasi Ayam dan crepes Cina! Pilihan permainan papan juga sangat banyak, tak sabar menunggu pembatasan Covid berakhir.

reviews.author: Lisa Just Goods
reviews.text: I loved the food here! I got the Korean Glass Noodles and I was pleasantly surprised by the freshness of the vegetables inside. My son loved the Chinese Crepes. We did not play any of the board games here, but were impressed by the variety. Service was friendly and the food was quick.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menyukai makanan di sini! Saya mendapat Mie Kaca Korea dan saya terkejut dengan kesegaran sayuran di dalamnya. Anakku suka Crepes Cina. Kami tidak memainkan permainan papan apa pun di sini, tetapi terkesan dengan keragamannya. Pelayanannya ramah dan makanannya cepat.

reviews.author: Esther Chuah
reviews.text: Went on the recommendation of a friend and had a fantastic time! This is also the only chicken rice place I've found in Madison, and it lives up to expectations. I'll definitely be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pergi atas rekomendasi teman dan sangat menikmatinya! Ini juga satu-satunya tempat makan nasi ayam yang saya temukan di Madison, dan benar-benar sesuai harapan. Saya pasti akan kembali!

reviews.author: Rebecca Bedell
reviews.text:
Excellent and diverse game selections, and every time I’ve been the staff are very enthusiastic and knowledgeable. The food and tea are fantastic— the jian bing is a personal favorite. A++ would absolutely recommend to any level of board gamer, or just to have a bite to eat!

I’ve played Wingspan and Root here, and excited to try out several others!
reviews.textTranslated:
Pilihan permainannya sangat bagus dan beragam, dan setiap kali saya datang, stafnya sangat antusias dan berpengetahuan luas. Makanan dan tehnya fantastis—jian bing adalah favorit pribadi saya. A++ sangat direkomendasikan untuk semua level pemain board game, atau sekadar untuk makan!

Saya sudah memainkan Wingspan dan Root di sini, dan sangat bersemangat untuk mencoba beberapa permainan lainnya!

reviews.author: Lily H
reviews.text: Honestly, a joy of an establishment. The game selection is excellent and widely varied for group sizes, investment levels, mood. The food is quite good and the staff is enthusiastic and helpful. We come back regularly and are so happy to have roll play in Madison. It's great for date night and for trying out games we're considering buying
reviews.textTranslated: Jujur saja, tempat ini sangat menyenangkan. Pilihan permainannya sangat bagus dan beragam, cocok untuk ukuran kelompok, tingkat investasi, dan suasana hati. Makanannya cukup enak dan stafnya antusias serta membantu. Kami sering kembali dan sangat senang memiliki tempat bermain peran di Madison. Tempat ini bagus untuk kencan malam dan untuk mencoba permainan yang sedang kami pertimbangkan untuk dibeli.

reviews.author: Julian Nin
reviews.text: Nice place to try out boardgames with friends. They have a good selection of games and pretty good food. If they get a liquor license it'll be even better. One critique is the staff are a bit too attentive, asking if we needed help so much I felt they were nervous about our presence.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk mencoba permainan papan bersama teman-teman. Mereka punya banyak pilihan permainan dan makanannya lumayan enak. Kalau mereka punya izin minuman keras, pasti lebih seru lagi. Salah satu kritiknya adalah stafnya agak terlalu perhatian, sampai-sampai bertanya apakah kami butuh bantuan sampai-sampai saya merasa mereka gugup dengan kehadiran kami.

reviews.author: Sam Szotkowski
reviews.text: One of my my favorite spots, my girlfriend and I have come here 3 or 4 times in the last few weeks.  The food and drinks are fresh and tasty, and the staff is very knowledgeable and friendly.  They help you choose a game, explain the rules, and are available if you need clarifications while you play.  The cost is super reasonable too, only $5 for games and food is at typical prices.  Can't wait to come back.
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu tempat favoritku, aku dan pacarku sudah datang ke sini 3 atau 4 kali dalam beberapa minggu terakhir. Makanan dan minumannya segar dan enak, dan stafnya sangat berpengetahuan dan ramah. Mereka membantumu memilih permainan, menjelaskan aturannya, dan siap membantu jika kamu membutuhkan klarifikasi saat bermain. Biayanya juga sangat terjangkau, hanya $5 untuk permainan dan makanannya dengan harga standar. Tak sabar untuk kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Galen Erickson
reviews.text: Really nice place to spend a couple hours trying out some new board games, the sparkling cider was really good and the food looks excellent although I didn't get a chance to try it yet. Will definitely be back soon, try it out if you haven't yet!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang sangat bagus untuk menghabiskan beberapa jam mencoba beberapa permainan papan baru, sari apel bersodanya sangat enak dan makanannya terlihat luar biasa meskipun saya belum sempat mencicipinya. Pasti akan segera kembali, cobalah jika Anda belum pernah ke sana!

reviews.author: Cora Sherman
reviews.text:
Came in on a whim and was blown away by the place. The staff helped me chose a board game (wingspan, which I ended up loving), taught me the rules which saved a ton of time for me.

Since that first time I've come back twice and each time has been great. I'm using roll play as a way to check out board games before I buy them, but it's also just a fun place to meet with your friends and learn a board game together.

The prices are reasonable and I recommend getting a muffin from the kitchen.

UPDATE: Came back 3 months later, place is still amazing. Food and drink menu had been update and they were great. The sparkling cranberry  juice tasted amazing.

I really recommend checking this place out.

Sincerely,
A fan of board games
reviews.textTranslated:
Datang tanpa pikir panjang dan saya benar-benar terkesan dengan tempat ini. Stafnya membantu saya memilih permainan papan (wingspan, yang akhirnya saya sukai), mengajari saya aturan mainnya yang sangat menghemat waktu saya.

Sejak pertama kali itu, saya sudah kembali dua kali dan setiap kali selalu menyenangkan. Saya menggunakan permainan peran sebagai cara untuk melihat-lihat permainan papan sebelum membelinya, tetapi tempat ini juga merupakan tempat yang menyenangkan untuk bertemu teman-teman dan belajar permainan papan bersama.

Harganya terjangkau dan saya sarankan untuk membeli muffin dari dapur.

PERBARUAN: Kembali lagi 3 bulan kemudian, tempatnya masih luar biasa. Menu makanan dan minuman telah diperbarui dan rasanya luar biasa. Jus cranberry bersoda rasanya luar biasa.

Saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk mengunjungi tempat ini.

Hormat saya,
Penggemar permainan papan

reviews.author: Andrew Santos
reviews.text: Great staff and great food. When my wife and I first arrived we were asked if we were there for food or games. When we said both, we were lead downstairs, we were helped finding a game that would suit our tastes, and we had the game explained to us with examples.  And the food was very good as well. The staff was very friendly and provided a comfortable environment. I highly recommend this place.
reviews.textTranslated: Stafnya ramah dan makanannya lezat. Saat saya dan istri pertama kali tiba, kami ditanya apakah kami ingin makan atau bermain. Ketika kami menjawab keduanya, kami diantar ke bawah, dibantu menemukan permainan yang sesuai selera kami, dan kami diberi penjelasan tentang permainan tersebut beserta contohnya. Makanannya juga sangat lezat. Stafnya sangat ramah dan menyediakan suasana yang nyaman. Saya sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini.

reviews.author: Valentine Bauer (ypsksfgos)
reviews.text: Stopped in on the way to work, staff was super friendly, they had a great selection of games,  and the food was AMAZING! Will be stopping in again tomorrow and probably the next day as well.
reviews.textTranslated: Mampir ke sini dalam perjalanan ke tempat kerja, stafnya sangat ramah, mereka punya banyak pilihan permainan, dan makanannya LUAR BIASA! Akan mampir lagi besok dan mungkin lusa juga.

reviews.author: Brennan
reviews.text: Fantastic food you won't find anywhere else, super friendly staff, and an amazing selection of games! Great value for the price, will definitely be back soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan fantastis yang tak akan Anda temukan di tempat lain, staf yang sangat ramah, dan pilihan permainan yang luar biasa! Harganya sepadan, pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Derek Ho
reviews.text: Great games great food
reviews.textTranslated: Permainan hebat, makanan hebat

reviews.author: Yujun Choi
reviews.text: 오픈한지 얼마 되지 않은 이곳을 설명해드림. 일단 보드게임카페인데 간단한 음식도 파는 곳임. 1층은 주방, 지하1층은 보드게임하는 공간. 우선 보드게임이 언뜻봐도 200개는 넘는듯? 한국에서 보던 게임들도 있지만 처음보는게 대부분임. 음식은 위에서 직접 시켜도 되고 아래에서 서버한테 시켜도 됨. 기본적인 커피나 차 종류 있고, 각종 아시안 길거리음식들이 있는데 한국음식은 잡채, 떡볶이, 오뎅이 있음. 그중 잡채는 완전 한국식까진 아니어도 상당히 맛있으니 추천추천! 커다란 지안빙도 맛있다고 함. 보드게임 이용은 1인당 처음 3시간에 5불이고, 그 이후 1시간 당 1불씩 추가. 가성비, 음식 맛, 시설 등 종합해보면 진짜 굿굿. 플래닛이랑 스플렌더 처음 해봤는데 머리 쓰면서 전략 짜는거 좋아하면 꿀잼ㅋㅋ
reviews.textTranslated: Izinkan saya menjelaskan tempat yang baru dibuka ini. Ini adalah kafe permainan papan yang juga menyajikan makanan ringan. Lantai pertama adalah dapur, dan ruang bawah tanah adalah area permainan papan. Sekilas, sepertinya ada lebih dari 200 permainan papan. Beberapa familiar dari Korea, tetapi sebagian besar baru bagi saya. Anda bisa memesan makanan langsung dari atas atau bertanya kepada pelayan di bawah. Mereka menyediakan pilihan kopi dan teh sederhana, serta berbagai jajanan kaki lima Asia, termasuk hidangan Korea seperti japchae (mi goreng dengan sayuran), tteokbokki (kue beras goreng), dan oden (kue ikan). Japchae-nya memang bukan makanan Korea, tetapi cukup lezat, jadi saya sangat merekomendasikannya! Jianbing (kue beras pedas) berukuran besar juga kabarnya lezat. Biaya penggunaan permainan papan adalah $5 per orang untuk tiga jam pertama, dengan tambahan $1 per jam setelahnya. Mengingat nilai, kualitas makanan, dan fasilitasnya, ini adalah penawaran yang bagus. Saya mencoba Planet dan Splendor untuk pertama kalinya, dan jika Anda gemar menggunakan otak dan menyusun strategi, itu sangat menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Antonio Tang
reviews.text:
Game master was knowledgeable and friendly, as were the rest of the staff. Food comes quickly and seems authentic. I DO want to suggest the use of foam board insulation though as the only other group of board gamers on the lower floor made it difficult to even converse and think. (Party games can get very loud.) I can't imagine what things are like with several groups like that down there.

Added: I went there again and found that the table under the stairs wasn't too bad. The staff seemed really accommodating toward the issue, suggesting a table up top this time around. Giving them the full five stars, but I still insist on better insulation.
reviews.textTranslated:
Game masternya berpengetahuan luas dan ramah, begitu pula staf lainnya. Makanan datang dengan cepat dan terasa autentik. Saya ingin menyarankan penggunaan insulasi papan busa karena satu-satunya kelompok pemain papan lainnya di lantai bawah membuat kami kesulitan untuk mengobrol dan berpikir. (Permainan pesta bisa sangat berisik.) Saya tidak bisa membayangkan bagaimana rasanya berada di sana dengan beberapa kelompok seperti itu.

Ditambahkan: Saya kembali ke sana dan menemukan bahwa meja di bawah tangga tidak terlalu buruk. Stafnya tampak sangat akomodatif terhadap masalah ini, kali ini mereka menyarankan meja di atas. Memberi mereka lima bintang penuh, tetapi saya tetap menginginkan insulasi yang lebih baik.

reviews.author: Won Suk Song
reviews.text:
The food here is great. My friends and I tried the crepes, the chicken rice, and a daily need rice special. They were all quite good. It's not a 12 course meal that will blow you away but it's cozy, savory, and delicious.
The board game selection here is quite nice and the staff helped us decide on a game (explained what type of game each was) then explained the rules for us once we picked one. Awesome, awesome place.
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanan di sini sangat enak. Saya dan teman-teman saya mencoba crepes, nasi ayam, dan nasi spesial harian. Semuanya cukup enak. Ini bukan hidangan 12 menu yang akan membuat Anda terpukau, tetapi nyaman, gurih, dan lezat.
Pilihan permainan papan di sini cukup bagus dan staf membantu kami memilih permainan (menjelaskan jenis permainan masing-masing) kemudian menjelaskan aturannya setelah kami memilih salah satu. Tempat yang luar biasa.

reviews.author: Jonathan Nikoleyczik
reviews.text:
A great place to spend a few hours playing board games and eating Chinese street food! Went with a few friends and had an amazing time. The staff were all very knowledgeable about all the games we wanted to play and had suggestions about games to try next. While we were playing we ordered a crepe and it was so good that before we left we order 2 more.
You pay by the hour after the first 3 hours and it's only a few dollars. I plan on bringing all my friends from out of town here, it's a unique idea and very well executed.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat yang asyik untuk menghabiskan beberapa jam bermain permainan papan dan menikmati jajanan kaki lima Cina! Kami pergi bersama beberapa teman dan bersenang-senang. Semua staf sangat berpengetahuan tentang semua permainan yang ingin kami mainkan dan memberikan saran permainan yang bisa dicoba selanjutnya. Saat bermain, kami memesan krep dan rasanya begitu lezat sehingga sebelum pergi kami memesan 2 lagi.
Anda membayar per jam setelah 3 jam pertama dan harganya hanya beberapa dolar. Saya berencana mengajak semua teman saya dari luar kota ke sini, idenya unik dan dieksekusi dengan sangat baik.

reviews.author: MELANIE ROGERS
reviews.text: Huge selection of games, wonderful staff, and delicious muffins & food (try the taro!) :)
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak pilihan permainan, staf yang ramah, dan muffin & makanan yang lezat (coba yang taro!) :)
